title: Animated Rainbow XP Bar
description: The original Modrinth Animated Rainbow Experience Bar!
body:
# Animated Rainbow XP Bar

Makes your experience bar an animated rainbow!! 🤩

![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/e0jSqIfN/images/745d3e7eece5a153f984a81324f1ec07b77178c9.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/e0jSqIfN/images/745d3e7eece5a153f984a81324f1ec07b77178c9.png)
yes it's animated ...

**A subtle and an extreme version are coming soon...**

---

Thank you for reading and for using this resource pack. 💙
